reasoning: The primary limiter for you is lactate clearance and aerobic base development. Your power drop from 5-min to 20-min efforts suggests a need for improvement in fatigue resistance. Tackling this will enable you to hold a steady output during challenging segments like the Sundance to Cascade Springs climb in the Alpine Loop. Your last ride indicates a solid endurance base was leveraged, but now we need to push beyond that threshold.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12 min over-unders: 2 mins at 242-256W, 4 mins at 209-223W, repeat. Focus on staying relaxed.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
